_comment: Windows side of cross-OS cleanup. Thin dispatcher onto scripts/os/run.ps1 clean. Plan-then-confirm by default; pass --dry-run for preview only.
name: 65-os-clean
title: OS Clean (Windows)

verify._comment: After apply, re-invoke `os clean --dry-run` and any category whose row count drops to 0 is PASS. Categories where rows persist are FAIL(n).
